method_summary: Sol-RL is a two-stage reinforcement learning framework that uses NVFP4 quantization for efficient rollout generation and BF16 precision for policy optimization, decoupling exploration from optimization.
key_innovation: The integration of FP4 quantization for high-throughput rollouts while maintaining BF16 precision for policy optimization, achieving both efficiency and training integrity.
title: FP4 Explore, BF16 Train: Diffusion Reinforcement Learning via Efficient Rollout Scaling
